name: Δ Hidden Forbidden Radiation
author: ᵂᶤʳᵉᵈ
description: Arche Koeln Waterfall‚ the entrance to the path to the End of Land․ Without the light of the gods‚ the earth fell to Shadow․ Beyond the great waterfall‚ confined within the temple‚ a mage gave his life to call upon 6 great spirits and 2 goddesses‚ shining light once more and containing the Shadow․ Faithfully recreated from the game ․hack⁄⁄GU Last Recode
